posts.author: sdetrick (Stephanie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Our organization is using Adobe sign…we need an integration similar to the docusign option.

What are you trying to achieve

We are trying to have Adobe Sign be an integration option, similar to other apps and companies within the platform like Jira, docusign, etc.
